body.note: rss's real item reads decode an RSS/XML <channel><item> body, not JSON; this fixture documents the PROJECTED record shape only (id/title/link/description/published_at) and is never replayed (metadata.json's bundle-level conformance.skip_dynamic marker skips every dynamic check for this bundle). See internal/connectors/hooks/rss/hooks_test.go and archived parity evidence for rss for the real XML-based read coverage.
